extraction.one_line_summary: TRENTIN Matteo attacked from a 33-rider breakaway with 37km remaining, dropped all chasers on final climb, won by 29 seconds over Asgreen.
tactical_patterns: DE GENDT Thomas forced 33-rider break in first kilometer, proving sprinter teams won't chase oversized breaks in transition stages.
Deceuninck-QuickStep gave ASGREEN Casper freedom despite normally controlling, signaling they prioritized yellow jersey defense over stage hunting.
TRENTIN launched third acceleration on final climb to establish winning gap, showing serial attacks break elite breakaway riders better than single effort.

rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: positive: Solo attacked three times from elite 33-man break, dropped Asgreen/Wanty on final climb with 30-second margin
rider_signals.ASGREEN Casper: positive: Given rare freedom by Deceuninck, chased Trentin alone up final climb but left it too late by third
rider_signals.DE GENDT Thomas: neutral: Initiated break in kilometer one but missed final selection with 37km left, showing limits against pure finishers
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: neutral: Held yellow with entire Deceuninck team sitting up, confirming they're managing GC not attacking stages in transition phases
